body:
## Scope
Add comprehensive tests for `aragora/swarm/proof_first_queue.py` covering all classification lanes: benchmark_regression, rescue_productization, docs_proof_drift, roadmap_do_now, blocked_roadmap_lane, and non_canonical.

## Why (benchmark truth and queue governance)
The proof-first queue governance is the gate that prevents non-canonical work from entering the boss loop. Comprehensive classification tests ensure the gate stays reliable as roadmap codes evolve.

## Files
- `tests/swarm/test_proof_first_queue_classification.py` (new)
- Tests: classify_proof_first_queue_issue with various inputs

## Acceptance
- `pytest tests/swarm/test_proof_first_queue_classification.py -v` passes
- All 6 classification lanes have at least 2 test cases each

comments.body: Boss loop exhausted 3 attempts. Auto-decomposed into 3 smaller sub-issues.

title: [TW-02] Add comprehensive proof-first queue classification tests
